{R}, {T}, Remove a counter from Finn: Finn deals 2 damage to any target.

Whenever an opponent attacks you, create a 1/1 white Human Soldier creature token with “This creature must block each combat if able.”
Sacrifice Queen Padmé Amidala: Put a shield counter on each of up to two target creatures you control.

When Supreme Leader Snoke enters, search your library for a legendary creature card, exile it, then shuffle. When you do, change Supreme Leader Snoke's base power and toughness to the exiled card's power and toughness.
When Supreme Leader Snoke dies, put the exiled card into your hand.

Vigilance, haste
Whenever you activate an ability of an artifact that isn't a mana ability, you may put a charge counter on that artifact.
Whenever Poe Dameron attacks, you may remove a charge counter from an artifact you control. If you do, draw two cards and untap that artifact.

Force — {R}{W}, {Q}: You may exile target creature you control and put a guard counter on it. Until end of turn, target artifact creature gains double strike, haste, and “Whenever this deals combat damage to a player, you may put a creature card exiled with a guard counter on it onto the battlefield under your control.” [i](Activate only once each turn.)[/i]

Haste
Darth Maul enters with a double strike counter on him if {R}{R} was spent to cast him, and a menace counter if {B}{B} was spent.
Escape—{BR}{BR}, Pay 4 life, Sacrifice four artifacts.

When Master Qui-Gon Jinn enters, if {W}{W} was spent to cast him, search your library for a creature card with power 2 or less, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.
Force — {U}{U}, {Q}: Counter target spell or ability that targets a creature you control, then return that creature to its owner's hand. [i](Activate only once each turn.)[/i]

Whenever Boba Fett attacks, you may hunt target creature until end of turn.
Whenever you hunt a creature, you may pay {BG}{BG}. If {B} was spent this way, Boba Fett gains deathtouch until end of turn, then if {G} was spent, he fights another target creature.
Bounty — Create two 1/1 black Rogue creature tokens.

When Jar-Jar Binks enters, create a 2/2 white Soldier creature token for each {W}{W} spent to cast him, then each player sacrifices a nontoken creature for each {B}{B} spent.
Protection from artifacts and spells

Whenever you activate an ability of an artifact or Planet that isn't a mana ability, you may pay {UR}{UR}. Scry 2 for each {U} spent this way, then exile the top card of your library for each {R} spent.
You may play cards exiled with Wedge Antilles as long as he's tapped.

{W}{W}, {T}: Create Eravana, a legendary colorless Spacecraft artifact token with station and “[4+]—This Spacecraft is a 6/6 with flying and vigilance.”
{R}{R}, Sacrifice an artifact: Han Solo deals damage to any target equal to the number of counters on the sacrificed artifact.

{U}{U}, {T}: Surveil 2, then draw a card.
{B}{B}, {T}: Return a card that was put into a graveyard this turn to its owner's hand.
Pay 2 life, Exile a card from your graveyard: Untap Count Dooku.

Captain Rex can't be countered.
Captain Rex enters with a haste counter on him if {R}{R} was spent to cast him, and a +1/+1 counter if {G}{G} was spent.
Nontoken artifacts and creatures you control enter with an additional counter on them of a kind on Captain Rex.

Other creatures you control have ward {X}, where X is that creature's power.
Whenever another nontoken creature you control enters, you may pay {GW}{GW}. If you do, put a +1/+1 counter on it for each {G} spent this way and create a 1/1 white Citizen creature token for each {W} spent.

Choose two —
• Untap up to two target artifacts and/or creatures.
• Tap up to two target artifacts and/or creatures.
• Target player draws a card.
• Counter target activated or triggered ability.

Choose two —
• Target player creates a 2/2 white Soldier creature token.
• Hunt an artifact or creature target player controls until end of turn.
• Target player sacrifices an artifact or creature.
• Creatures get -1/-1 until end of turn.

Whenever an artifact you control dies, you may discard a card. If you do, draw a card.

[i](As a Mission enters, choose an opponent to protect it.)[/i]

Whenever Exogorth blocks or becomes blocked by a creature, exile it until Exogorth leaves the battlefield.

Whenever you sacrifice another permanent, put an exalted counter on Grand Moff Tarkin.
{3}, Sacrifice another creature or artifact: Draw a card. Activate only once each turn.
